---
title: "Keyword and Semantic Search"
description: "Searching for products"
description-short: "Searching for products"
duration: 60 mins

editor: { render-on-save: true }
---

## Slides

{{< revealjs "slides/slides-04-search.html" height="600px" class="ratio ratio-16x9" >}}


## Outline

- Keyword search
- Semantic search
- Natural language queries
